name: Social Sprout
highlight_text: Best Suited For: SMBs, Enterprises and Large Businesses
description:
What Social Sprout Does?

Sprout Social’s Facebook integration streamlines managing Pages and Messenger conversations with a centralized content calendar, unified inbox, and detailed analytics. It helps with team collaboration, workflows, and task routing, making Facebook management more efficient.

Features

  • Centralized content calendar for planning and publishing.
  • Unified inbox for managing comments, reviews, and Messenger conversations.
  • Detailed analytics for tracking post performance and engagement.
  • Approval workflows and task routing for team collaboration.
  • Monitoring tools for Facebook reviews and messages.

Benefits

  • Streamlines content creation and scheduling.
  • Enhances engagement management with a single platform.
  • Provides deep insights into social media performance.
  • Facilitates efficient collaboration among team members.
  • Helps maintain a positive online reputation.

Pros

✅ Has a responsive customer support team who is helpful and prompt with their solutions

Cons 

❌ Users complain that it needs to have more AI-driven tools as the ones that are currently available have limited posting capabilities

‍

Priced at $199 Per Month
